      "question": "What is a deadlock in the context of operating systems?",
      "options": ["A) A situation where a process is waiting for a resource that is currently in use by another process", "B) A situation where a process is executing a critical section of code", "C) A situation where two or more processes are blocking each other indefinitely", "D) A situation where a process is waiting for an I/O operation to complete"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation":
